Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Soulsmiths]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Soulsmiths are present in the Five Factions Alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — The Blackflame Empire has access to Soulsmiths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Soulsmiths formed a spear seamlessly from madra.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Soulsmiths dispose of dead matter in chambers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The Path of the Last Oath was designed for and by Soulsmiths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — The Soulsmiths made a prosthetic for Lady Nakali.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — The Soulsmiths attempted to develop an advanced memory construct at Ghostwater to take over mental processes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Soulsmiths attempted to create a construct that could work alongside a person's brain.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Renegade Soulsmiths were caught selling faulty healing constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Local Soulsmiths buy Remnants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Soulsmiths left information constructs in Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 16''' — King Dakata orders the Soulsmiths to finish new armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Soulsmiths are people who craft armor.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Soulsmiths find men’hla tree leaves valuable because each leaf produces a separate Remnant.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Soulsmiths who can directly manipulate their willpower are Lords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Dross feeds the memories of other Soulsmiths into Lindon's mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — A team of Soulsmiths previously owned the labyrinth.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Soulsmiths have made bows before.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
